emails.subject: Fax Cover Sheet
emails.body: Fax Cover Sheet Mark, Please disregard the comments on the fax cover sheet just sent to you. You should have received with the cover sheet the Notice letter from Crestone Energy Ventures, LLC regarding the Master Services Agreement. If you did not receive that letter, please notify me as soon as possible. Janet Place

emails.subject: RE: Fax Cover Sheet
emails.body: RE: Fax Cover Sheet Please also fax this letter to our credit war room in Houston. The is 303-646-3227.

emails.subject: RE: Fax Cover Sheet
emails.body: Please verify the Houston fax number. Isn't "303" a Denver prefix?? Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Fax Cover Sheet
emails.body: Sorry you are correct. 713 is correct. It has been a long week. Thanks Mark
